channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists search microbiome for clues to rising colorectal cancers
item.description: Doctors are investigating why colorectal cancer has become more lethal for younger people.

item.title: Musk vs. Altman: Court battle over OpenAI's fate
item.description: Former business partners clash in high-stakes dispute over the future of a top AI company.

item.title: Alleged WHCD shooter to appear in federal court
item.description: Suspect faces charges including assault on a federal officer with a dangerous weapon.

item.title: Inflation drains teacher pay raises, report says
item.description: Teacher pay increases can't keep up with inflation; public school enrollment declines.
